sampleDataDialog.title: 示例数据
sampleDataDialog.createPrompt: 创建容器“{{containerName}}”，并将示例数据导入其中。这可能需要几分钟时间。
sampleDataDialog.success: 已成功使用示例数据创建“{{containerName}}”。
sampleDataDialog.errorContainerExists: 数据库“{{databaseName}}”中的容器“{{containerName}}”已存在。请将其删除，然后重试。

documents.unsavedChangesMessage: 未保存的更改将会丢失。是否要继续?
documents.throttlingError: 由于速率限制错误，某些文档无法删除。请稍后重试。若要防止将来出现这种情况，请考虑增加容器或数据库的吞吐量。
documents.deleteDocumentFailedLog: 未能删除具有状态代码 {{statusCode}} 的文档 {{documentId}}
documents.deleteSuccessLog: 已成功删除 {{count}} 个文档
documents.deleteThrottledLog: 由于“请求太大”(429)错误，未能删除 {{count}} 个文档。正在重试...
documents.missingShardKeyLog: 未能保存新文档: 未定义文档分片键
documents.filterTooltip: 键入查询谓词或从列表中选择一个。
documents.deletedDocumentsSuccess: 已成功删除 {{count}} 个文档。
documents.requestTooLargeBase: 由于“请求太大”异常(429)，某些删除请求失败
documents.increaseThroughputTip: 若要防止将来出现这种情况，请考虑增加容器或数据库的吞吐量。
documents.mongoFilterPlaceholder: 键入查询谓词(例如 {"id":"foo"})，或从下拉列表中选择一个，或留空以查询所有文档。
documents.sqlFilterPlaceholder: 键入查询谓词(例如 WHERE c.id="1")，或从下拉列表中选择一个，或留空以查询所有文档。

storedProcedure.idPlaceholder: 输入新的存储过程 ID

udf.idPlaceholder: 输入新的用户定义的函数 ID

conflicts.changesWillBeLost: 更改将丢失。是否要继续?

deleteDatabase.warningMessage: 警告!你将执行的操作无法撤消。继续操作将永久删除此资源及其所有子资源。
deleteDatabase.confirmPrompt: 通过键入 {{databaseName}} ID(名称)进行确认
deleteDatabase.inputMismatch: 输入的 {{databaseName}} 名称 '{{input}}' 与所选的 {{databaseName}} '{{selectedId}}' 不匹配
deleteDatabase.feedbackTitle: 帮助我们改进 Azure Cosmos DB!
deleteDatabase.feedbackReason: 删除此 {{databaseName}} 的原因是什么?

deleteCollection.confirmPrompt: 通过键入 {{collectionName}} ID 进行确认
deleteCollection.inputMismatch: 输入 id {{input}} 与所选 {{selectedId}} 不匹配
deleteCollection.feedbackTitle: 帮助我们改进 Azure Cosmos DB!
deleteCollection.feedbackReason: 删除此 {{collectionName}} 的原因是什么?

addDatabase.databaseTooltip: {{databaseLabel}} 是一个或多个 {{collectionsLabel}} 的逻辑容器
addDatabase.shareThroughputTooltip: {{databaseLabel}} 级别的预配吞吐量将在 {{databaseLabel}} 内的所有 {{collectionsLabel}} 之间共享。
addDatabase.greaterThanError: 对于 autopilot 吞吐量，请输入大于 {{minValue}} 的值
addDatabase.acknowledgeSpendError: 请确认估计的 {{period}} 支出。
addDatabase.acknowledgeSpendErrorMonthly: Please acknowledge the estimated monthly spend.
addDatabase.acknowledgeSpendErrorDaily: Please acknowledge the estimated daily spend.

addCollection.databaseTooltip: 数据库类似于命名空间。它是一组 {{collectionName}} 的管理单元。
addCollection.shareThroughputTooltip: 在数据库级别配置的吞吐量将在数据库内的所有 {{collectionName}} 之间共享。
addCollection.collectionIdTooltip: {{collectionName}} 的唯一标识符，用于通过 REST 和所有 SDK 进行基于 ID 的路由。
addCollection.shardingTooltip: 分片集合跨多个副本集(分片)拆分数据，以实现无限的可伸缩性。分片集合需要选择分片键(字段)以均匀分布数据。
addCollection.hierarchicalPartitionKeyInfo: 此功能允许你使用最多三个级别的键对数据进行分区，以便更好地进行数据分发。需要 .NET V3、Java V4 SDK 或预览版 JavaScript V3 SDK。
addCollection.provisionDedicatedThroughput: 为此 {{collectionName}} 预配专用吞吐量
addCollection.provisionDedicatedThroughputTooltip: 可以选择为已预配吞吐量的数据库内的 {{collectionName}} 预配专用吞吐量。此专用吞吐量不会与数据库中的其他 {{collectionNamePlural}} 共享，也不计入为数据库预配的吞吐量。除了在数据库级别预配的吞吐量量外，还将对此吞吐量进行计费。
addCollection.uniqueKeysPlaceholderMongo: 逗号分隔的路径，例如 firstName, address.zipCode
addCollection.analyticalStoreSynapseLinkRequired: 创建分析存储 {{collectionName}} 时需要 Azure Synapse Link。为此 Cosmos DB 帐户启用 Synapse Link。
addCollection.mongoIndexingTooltip: 默认为 _id 字段编制索引。为所有字段创建通配符索引将优化查询，建议用于开发。
addCollection.createWildcardIndex: 在所有字段上创建通配符索引
addCollection.legacySdkCheckbox: 我的应用程序使用较旧的 Cosmos .NET 或 Java SDK 版本(.NET V1 或 Java V2)
addCollection.legacySdkInfo: 为了确保与较旧的 SDK 兼容，创建的容器将使用旧版分区方案，该方案仅支持大小上限为 101 字节的分区键值。如果启用此功能，将无法使用分层分区键。
addCollection.indexingOnInfo: 默认情况下，将为文档中的所有属性编制索引，以便进行灵活高效的查询。
addCollection.indexingOffInfo: 索引将关闭。如果不需要运行查询或仅具有键值操作，则建议使用。
addCollection.indexingOffWarning: 通过在关闭索引的情况下创建此容器，你将无法进行任何索引策略更改。仅允许对具有索引策略的容器进行索引更改。
addCollection.acknowledgeSpendErrorMonthly: 请确认估计的每月支出。
addCollection.acknowledgeSpendErrorDaily: 请确认估计的每日支出。
addCollection.unshardedMaxRuError: 未分片集合最多支持 10,000 RU
addCollection.acknowledgeShareThroughputError: 请确认此专用吞吐量的估计成本。
addCollection.vectorPolicyError: 请修复容器向量策略中的错误
addCollection.fullTextSearchPolicyError: 请修复容器全文搜索策略中的错误
addCollection.newDatabaseIdAriaLabel: New database id, Type a new database id

teachingBubble.step1Body: Database is the parent of a container. You can create a new database or use an existing one. In this tutorial we are creating a new database named SampleDB.
teachingBubble.step2Body: Cosmos DB recommends sharing throughput across database. Autoscale will give you a flexible amount of throughput based on the max RU/s set (Request Units).
teachingBubble.step4Body: Last step - you will need to define a partition key for your collection. /address was chosen for this particular example. A good partition key should have a wide range of possible value
teachingBubble.step5Body: A sample container is now being created and we are adding sample data for you. It should take about 1 minute.
teachingBubble.step5BodyFollowUp: Once the sample container is created, review your sample dataset and follow next steps

addCollectionUtility.shardKeyTooltip: 分片键(字段)用于跨多个副本集(分片)拆分数据，以实现无限的可伸缩性。选择将均匀分发数据的字段至关重要。
addCollectionUtility.partitionKeyTooltip: {{partitionKeyName}} 用于跨分区自动分发数据，以实现可伸缩性。在 JSON 文档中选择一个具有各种值并均匀分布请求卷的属性。
addCollectionUtility.partitionKeyTooltipSqlSuffix: 对于小型读密集型工作负载或任何规模的写密集型工作负载，id 通常是一个不错的选择。
addCollectionUtility.partitionKeyPlaceholderFirst: 必需 - 第一个分区键，例如 /TenantId
addCollectionUtility.uniqueKeysTooltip: 唯一键使开发人员能够向其数据库添加一层数据完整性。通过在创建容器时创建唯一键策略，可以确保每个分区键一个或多个值的唯一性。
addCollectionUtility.analyticalStoreTooltip: 使分析存储功能能够对作数据执行近实时分析，而不会影响事务工作负载的性能。
addCollectionUtility.analyticalStoreDescription: 使分析存储功能能够对作数据执行近实时分析，而不会影响事务工作负载的性能。
addCollectionUtility.vectorPolicyTooltip: 描述数据中包含向量的任何属性，以便它们可用于相似性查询。

settings.pageOptionsDescription: 选择“自定义”可指定要显示的固定数量的查询结果，选择“无限制”可显示每页任意数量的查询结果。
settings.queryResultsPerPageTooltip: 输入每页应显示的查询结果数。
settings.entraIdRbacDescription: 选择“自动”以自动启用 Entra ID RBAC。如果为 True/False，则强制启用/禁用 Entra ID RBAC。
settings.regionSelectionDescription: 更改 Cosmos 客户端用于访问帐户的区域。
settings.selectRegionTooltip: 更改用于执行客户端操作的帐户终结点。
settings.queryTimeoutDescription: 当查询达到指定的时间限制时，将显示一个弹出窗口，其中包含取消查询的选项，除非已启用自动取消。
settings.ruLimitDescription: 如果查询超过配置的 RU 限制，则查询将中止。
settings.defaultQueryResultsDescription: 选择显示查询结果时要使用的默认视图。
settings.retrySettingsDescription: 在 CosmosDB 查询期间与受限制的请求关联的重试策略。
settings.maxRetryAttemptsTooltip: 要为请求执行的最大重试次数。默认值 9。
settings.fixedRetryIntervalTooltip: 修复了在每次重试之间等待的重试间隔(以毫秒为单位)，忽略作为响应一部分返回的 retryAfter。默认值为 0 毫秒。
settings.maxWaitTimeTooltip: 重试期间等待请求的最长等待时间(以秒为单位)。默认值 30 秒。
settings.enableContainerPaginationDescription: 一次加载 50 个容器。目前，容器不会按字母数字顺序拉取。
settings.enableCrossPartitionQueryDescription: 执行查询时发送多个请求。如果查询的范围不限于单个分区键值，则需要多个请求。
settings.maxDegreeOfParallelismDescription: 获取或设置并行查询执行期间运行客户端的并发操作数。正值会将并发操作数限制为该值。若设置为小于 0，系统将自动决定并发操作数。
settings.priorityLevelDescription: 设置使用基于优先级的执行时来自数据资源管理器的数据平面请求的优先级。如果选择“无”，数据资源管理器将不指定优先级，将使用服务器端默认优先级。
settings.displayGremlinQueryResults: 将 Gremlin 查询结果显示为:
settings.displayGremlinQueryResultsDescription: 选择“图形”以自动将查询结果可视化为图形，或选择“JSON”以将结果显示为 JSON 格式。
settings.enableSampleDatabaseDescription: 这是一个包含合成产品数据的示例数据库和集合，可用于使用 NoSQL 查询进行浏览。它将作为数据资源管理器 UI 中的另一个数据库显示，由 Microsoft 创建并免费维护。
settings.enableSampleDbAriaLabel: 为查询浏览启用示例数据库
settings.guidRepresentationDescription: MongoDB 中的 GuidRepresentation 是指在 BSON 文档中存储全局唯一标识符(GUID)时如何进行序列化和反序列化。这适用于所有文档操作。
settings.ignorePartitionKey: 在文档更新时忽略分区键
settings.ignorePartitionKeyTooltip: 如果选中，分区键值将不会用于在更新操作期间查找文档。仅当文档更新由于异常分区键而失败时才使用此项。
settings.clearHistoryDescription: 此操作将清除此浏览器中此帐户的所有自定义设置，包括:
settings.clearHistoryTabLayout: 重置自定义选项卡布局，包括拆分器位置
settings.clearHistoryTableColumns: 擦除表列首选项，包括任何自定义列
settings.clearHistoryRegion: 将区域选择重置为全局
settings.popupsDisabledError:
我们无法为此帐户建立授权，因为浏览器中已禁用弹出窗口。
请为此网站启用弹出窗口，然后单击“登录 Entra ID”按钮
settings.failedToAcquireTokenError: 未能自动获取授权令牌。请单击“Entra ID 登录”按钮以启用 Entra ID RBAC 操作

saveQuery.setupCostMessage: 出于合规性原因，我们将在你的 Azure Cosmos 帐户中一个名为“{{databaseName}}”的独立数据库里保存查询。若要继续，我们需要在你的帐户中创建一个容器，估计每天额外费用为 0.77 美元。
saveQuery.failedToSetupContainerError: 未能为保存的查询设置容器
saveQuery.accountNotSetupError: 未能保存查询: 帐户未设置，无法保存查询
saveQuery.name: 名称

loadQuery.failedToLoadQueryFromFileError: 未能从文件 {{fileName}} 加载查询

executeStoredProcedure.enterInputParameters: 请输入输入参数(如果有)
executeStoredProcedure.invalidParamConsoleError: 指定的参数无效: {{invalidParam}} 不是有效的文本值

uploadItems.noFilesSpecifiedError: 未指定任何文件。请输入至少一个文件。
uploadItems.selectJsonFilesTooltip: 选择一个或多个要上传的 JSON 文件。每个文件可以包含单个 JSON 文档或 JSON 文档数组。单个上传操作中所有文件的总大小必须小于 2 MB。对于较大数据集，可以执行多次上传操作。
uploadItems.uploadStatus: {{numSucceeded}} 已创建，{{numThrottled}} 受限，{{numFailed}} 个错误

copyNotebook.selectLocation: 选择要复制的笔记本位置
copyNotebook.name: 名称

publishNotebook.publishDescription: 发布后，此笔记本将显示在 Azure Cosmos DB 笔记本公共库中。在发布之前，请确保已移除任何敏感数据或输出。
publishNotebook.publishPrompt: 是否要发布“{{name}}”并共享到库?
publishNotebook.name: 名称
publishNotebook.outputDoesNotExist: 任何单元格都不存在输出。
publishNotebook.failedToConvertError: 未能将 {{fileName}} 转换为 base64 格式

changePartitionKey.failedToStartError: 未能启动数据传输作业
changePartitionKey.suboptimalPartitionKeyError: 警告: 系统检测到集合使用的分区键可能不理想
changePartitionKey.description: 更改容器的分区键时，需要使用正确的分区键创建目标容器。还可以选择现有目标容器。
changePartitionKey.collectionIdTooltip: {{collectionName}} 的唯一标识符，用于通过 REST 和所有 SDK 进行基于 ID 的路由。
changePartitionKey.partitionKeyWarning: 目标容器必须不存在。数据资源管理器将为你创建新的目标容器。

cassandraAddCollection.keyspaceTooltip: 选择现有键空间或输入新的键空间 ID。
cassandraAddCollection.tableIdLabel: 输入 CQL 命令以创建表。
cassandraAddCollection.provisionDedicatedThroughput: 为此表预配专用吞吐量
cassandraAddCollection.provisionDedicatedThroughputTooltip: 可以选择为预配了吞吐量的键空间中的表预配专用吞吐量。此专用吞吐量量不会与键空间中的其他表共享，也不计入为键空间预配的吞吐量。除了在键空间级别预配的吞吐量量外，还将对此吞吐量进行计费。

tables.nullFieldsWarning: 警告: 空字段将不会显示供编辑。
tables.propertyEmptyError: {{property}} 不能为空。请输入 {{property}} 的值
tables.whitespaceError: {{property}} 不能有空格。请为 {{property}} 输入不带空格的值
tables.propertyTypeEmptyError: 属性类型不能为空。请从属性 {{property}} 的下拉列表中选择类型

tableColumnSelection.selectColumns: 选择要在容器中的项视图中显示的列。

addGlobalSecondaryIndex.globalSecondaryIndexId: 全局辅助索引容器 ID
addGlobalSecondaryIndex.projectionQueryTooltip: 详细了解如何定义全局辅助索引。
addGlobalSecondaryIndex.disabledTitle: 已在创建全局辅助索引。请等待它完成，然后再创建另一个。

stringInput.inputMismatchError: 输入 {{input}} 与所选的 {{selectedId}} 不匹配

mongoNotifications.selectTypeWarning: Please select a type for each index.
mongoNotifications.wildcardPathError: Wildcard path is not present in the field name. Use a pattern like

partitionKey.shardKeyTooltip: 分片键(字段)用于跨多个副本集(分片)拆分数据，以实现无限的可伸缩性。选择将均匀分发数据的字段至关重要。
partitionKey.partitionKeyTooltip: is used to automatically distribute data across partitions for scalability. Choose a property in your JSON document that has a wide range of values and evenly distributes request volume.
partitionKey.sqlPartitionKeyTooltipSuffix: 对于小型读密集型工作负载或任何规模的写密集型工作负载，id 通常是一个不错的选择。
partitionKey.partitionKeySubtext: For small workloads, the item ID is a suitable choice for the partition key.
partitionKey.sqlFirstPartitionKey: 必需 - 第一个分区键，例如 /TenantId

throughput.manualToAutoscaleDisclaimer: The starting autoscale max RU/s will be determined by the system, based on the current manual throughput settings and storage of your resource. After autoscale has been enabled, you can change the max RU/s.
throughput.ttlWarningText: The system will automatically delete items based on the TTL value (in seconds) you provide, without needing a delete operation explicitly issued by a client application. For more information see,
throughput.ttlWarningLinkText: Time to Live (TTL) in Azure Cosmos DB
throughput.unsavedEditorWarningPrefix: You have not saved the latest changes made to your
throughput.unsavedEditorWarningSuffix: . Please click save to confirm the changes.
throughput.updateDelayedApplyWarning: You are about to request an increase in throughput beyond the pre-allocated capacity. This operation will take some time to complete.
throughput.scalingUpDelayMessage: Scaling up will take 4-6 hours as it exceeds what Azure Cosmos DB can instantly support currently based on your number of physical partitions. You can increase your throughput to {{instantMaximumThroughput}} instantly or proceed with this value and wait until the scale-up is completed.
throughput.exceedPreAllocatedMessage: Your request to increase throughput exceeds the pre-allocated capacity which may take longer than expected. There are three options you can choose from to proceed:
throughput.instantScaleOption: You can instantly scale up to {{instantMaximumThroughput}} RU/s.
throughput.asyncScaleOption: You can asynchronously scale up to any value under {{maximumThroughput}} RU/s in 4-6 hours.
throughput.quotaMaxOption: Your current quota max is {{maximumThroughput}} RU/s. To go over this limit, you must request a quota increase and the Azure Cosmos DB team will review.
throughput.belowMinimumMessage: You are not able to lower throughput below your current minimum of {{minimum}} RU/s. For more information on this limit, please refer to our service quote documentation.
throughput.saveThroughputWarning: Your bill will be affected as you update your throughput settings. Please review the updated cost estimate below before saving your changes
throughput.applyDelayedMessage: The request to increase the throughput has successfully been submitted. This operation will take 1-3 business days to complete. View the latest status in Notifications.
throughput.applyShortDelayMessage: A request to increase the throughput is currently in progress. This operation will take some time to complete.
throughput.applyLongDelayMessage: A request to increase the throughput is currently in progress. This operation will take 1-3 business days to complete. View the latest status in Notifications.
throughput.throughputCapError: Your account is currently configured with a total throughput limit of {{throughputCap}} RU/s. This update isn't possible because it would increase the total throughput to {{newTotalThroughput}} RU/s. Change total throughput limit in cost management.
throughput.throughputIncrementError: Throughput value must be in increments of 1000

conflictResolution.lwwTooltip: Gets or sets the name of a integer property in your documents which is used for the Last Write Wins (LWW) based conflict resolution scheme. By default, the system uses the system defined timestamp property, _ts to decide the winner for the conflicting versions of the document. Specify your own integer property if you want to override the default timestamp based conflict resolution.
conflictResolution.customTooltip: Gets or sets the name of a stored procedure (aka merge procedure) for resolving the conflicts. You can write application defined logic to determine the winner of the conflicting versions of a document. The stored procedure will get executed transactionally, exactly once, on the server side. If you do not provide a stored procedure, the conflicts will be populated in the
conflictResolution.customTooltipSuffix: . You can update/re-register the stored procedure at any time.

changeFeed.label: Change feed log retention policy
changeFeed.tooltip: Enable change feed log retention policy to retain last 10 minutes of history for items in the container by default. To support this, the request unit (RU) charge for this container will be multiplied by a factor of two for writes. Reads are unaffected.

mongoIndexing.disclaimer: For queries that filter on multiple properties, create multiple single field indexes instead of a compound index.
mongoIndexing.disclaimerSuffix: are only used for sorting query results. If you need to add a compound index, you can create one using the Mongo shell.
mongoIndexing.compoundNotSupported: Collections with compound indexes are not yet supported in the indexing editor. To modify indexing policy for this collection, use the Mongo Shell.
mongoIndexing.aadError: To use the indexing policy editor, please login to the
mongoIndexing.canMakeMoreChangesZero: You can make more indexing changes once the current index transformation is complete.
mongoIndexing.refreshToCheck: Refresh to check if it has completed.
mongoIndexing.canMakeMoreChangesProgress: You can make more indexing changes once the current index transformation has completed. It is {{progress}}% complete.

subSettings.mongoTtlMessage: To enable time-to-live (TTL) for your collection/documents,
subSettings.partitionKeyTooltipTemplate: This {{partitionKeyName}} is used to distribute data across multiple partitions for scalability. The value "{{partitionKeyValue}}" determines how documents are partitioned.

scale.freeTierInfo: With free tier, you will get the first {{ru}} RU/s and {{storage}} GB of storage in this account for free. To keep your account free, keep the total RU/s across all resources in the account to {{ru}} RU/s.
scale.autoScaleCustomSettings: Your account has custom settings that prevents setting throughput at the container level. Please work with your Cosmos DB engineering team point of contact to make changes.
scale.keyspaceSharedThroughput: This table shared throughput is configured at the keyspace

partitionKeyEditor.safeguardWarning: To safeguard the integrity of the data being copied to the new container, ensure that no updates are made to the source container for the entire duration of the partition key change process.
partitionKeyEditor.changeDescription: To change the partition key, a new destination container must be created or an existing destination container selected. Data will then be copied to the destination container.

computedProperties.learnMorePrefix: about how to define computed properties and how to use them.

dataMasking.excludedPathsMustBeArray: excludedPaths must be an array if provided

containerPolicy.createFullTextPolicy: Create new full text search policy

globalSecondaryIndex.indexesDefined: This container has the following indexes defined for it.
globalSecondaryIndex.learnMoreSuffix: about how to define global secondary indexes and how to use them.

throughputInput.autoscaleDescription: Based on usage, your {{resourceType}} throughput will scale from
throughputInput.freeTierWarning: Billing will apply if you provision more than {{ru}} RU/s of manual throughput, or if the resource scales beyond {{ru}} RU/s with autoscale.
throughputInput.fixedStorageNote: When using a collection with fixed storage capacity, you can set up to 10,000 RU/s.
